name: Keiji Akaashi
description: __Height:__ 182.3 cm A second year at Fukurodani Academy, and its volleyball team's vice-captain and setter. Akaashi is often calm and collected, though he does have times where he begins to get worried about things. More often than not, he has to handle Bokuto and all of his antics during the game. When such happens, Akaashi usually thinks of some way to bring Bokuto into peak condition again, though there are times where he struggles with doing so.

name: Gohan Son
description: __Race:__ Half-Saiyan, Half-Human __Height:__ 175 cm (5'9”) Gohan is a shy and studious intellectual, and as a child lacks the Saiyan fighting spirit. However, because he is forced to protect the ones he loves, he taps into his vast half-breed Saiyan potential and emotional reserves, becoming one of the most powerful Z Fighters. name: Sakura Yamauchi
description: A high school student who suffers a pancreatic disease, having her lifespan cut in half. Despite her situation, she keeps her smile and even makes jokes about it. ~!She was later stabbed after being discharged from the hospital and sadly passed away.!~
